properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Deep is the river that I have to cross Heavy the weight on my shoulder I have discovered how great is the cost Of trying alone to cross over

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I try and I try but the current’s too strong It’s pulling me under and my strength is gone Don’t leave me stranded

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Rescue me, my God and my King, Water is rising and I cannot breathe, Wrap your arms all around me and Carry me over (rescue me) Carry me over

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is a bridge that is easy to cross While all of our burdens are lifted Peace is the land that is waiting for us Lord, give me faith to believe it

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Cause I’m in a storm but I’m willing to fight I’ll overcome and I will not die with You by my side

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will sail over the oceans and Fly over the mountains and Soar up to the Heavens Here is my hand, is my heart and my soul and my mind
